parameters.name: Parameter Save
parameters.comment: This parameter is used to save device parameters and recall saved parameters.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.comment: This parameter sets the language of the device. English language is available as standard. When user-defined is selected the 1st language loaded via USB becomes active.

parameters.name: Parameter Return Factory
parameters.comment: Default value assignments embedded in the device are made.

parameters.name: Log Clear
parameters.comment: All fault records in the device are deleted with this parameter.

parameters.name: Motor Time Setting
parameters.comment: Motor running and load running times in the device can be set as desired as a result of the value entered in this parameter. After saving the parameter the parameter value will be reset and the operating hour value will be updated.

parameters.name: Menu Timeout
parameters.comment: When no key is pressed during the time period specified with this parameter the device will automatically exit the menu. In addition after logging in to the menu if you do not log out with the Menu Logout parameter you can log in to the menu without a password within the time period specified here.

parameters.name: Menu Logout
parameters.comment: Allows manual exit from the menu. Thus password entry is required for the next menu entry.

parameters.name: Mains Off Mode Selection
parameters.comment: When the amplifier module is defined in the device it is the selection of whether the network will be active in off mode.

parameters.name: Mains Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains high voltage alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Voltage parameter depending on the Connection Type Parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains undervoltage alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Voltage parameter depending on the Connection Type Parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Overfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which network high frequency alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Underfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the threshold value at which mains low frequency alarm will be given. This parameter takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Mains Phase Sequence Control Action
parameters.comment: Phase sequence warning action selection is made.

parameters.name: Mains Connection Type
parameters.comment: This parameter selects the connection type of the network.

parameters.name: Nominal Voltage
parameters.comment: The nominal phase-notr voltage value at which the generator will operate.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator high voltage alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold value at which a generator high voltage alarm will be given. All phases are evaluated one by one and the maximum value is used. When the output voltage exceeds the entered value a high voltage alarm condition occurs and the action program starts to operate.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator low voltage alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold value at which a generator undervoltage alarm will be given. All phases are evaluated one by one and the minimum value is used. When the output voltage goes below the entered value a low voltage alarm condition occurs and the action program starts to operate.

parameters.name: Nominal Frequency
parameters.comment: The nominal frequency value at which the generator will operate.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator high frequency alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the generator high frequency alarm threshold value which takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Generator low frequency alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Level
parameters.comment: It is the generator low frequency alarm threshold value which takes value in relation to the Nominal Frequency parameter.

parameters.name: Generator Phase Sequence Control Action
parameters.comment: Phase sequence warning action selection is made.

parameters.name: Generator OverCurrent Alarm Action
parameters.comment: High current is alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator OverCurrent Alarm Level
parameters.comment: High current is the alarm threshold.

parameters.name: Generator OverPower Alarm Action
parameters.comment: High power alarm action.

parameters.name: Generator OverPower Alarm Level
parameters.comment: High power is the alarm threshold.

parameters.name: Generator Current Transformer Ratio
parameters.comment: Winding ratio of the current transformer input to the current input of the device to read the load current.

parameters.name: Generator Connection Type
parameters.comment: Generator connection type selection.

parameters.name: Mode Function
parameters.comment: Device mode selection.

parameters.name: Nominal Battery Voltage
parameters.comment: Nominal battery voltage

parameters.name: Battery Overvoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: High battery voltage is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Battery Overvoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: This is the threshold at which a battery high voltage alarm will be given.

parameters.name: Battery Undervoltage Alarm Action
parameters.comment: Low battery voltage is an alarm action.

parameters.name: Battery Undervoltage Alarm Level
parameters.comment: The threshold at which a battery low voltage alarm will be given.

parameters.name: Mains Fail Delay
parameters.comment: Mains is the delay time for any fault to be given.

parameters.name: Mains Phase Sequence Failure Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for a mains phase sequence fault.

parameters.name: Generator Overvoltage Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: This is the delay time for a generator high voltage alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Undervoltage Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator low voltage alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Overfrequency Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator high frequency alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Underfrequency Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for generator low frequency alarm.

parameters.name: Generator Circuit Break Close Ouput Pulse Time
parameters.comment: Closed output pulse duration for generator circuit breaker.

parameters.name: Generator Phase Sequence Failure Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for genset phase sequence fault.

parameters.name: Generator OverCurrent Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for the current passing through the load alarm.

parameters.name: Generator OverPower Alarm Delay
parameters.comment: Delay time for the power value alarm calculated on the load.

parameters.name: Start Delay
parameters.comment: Parameter for how long after a mains fault the device will auto-start.

parameters.name: Mains Return Delay
parameters.comment: This parameter is the mains stabilization time. The timer starts counting when the mains is restored. If there is no mains problem during this time ATS operation mode is finished.

parameters.name: Safety On Delay
parameters.comment: The time the controller ignores oil pressure engine speed and other delayed alarms during starting. This parameter is used to allow the engine to reach its rated speed before the protections are activated. When this parameter is set to 0 this function will be inactive.

parameters.name: Cooling Time
parameters.comment: This is the no-load cooling time before stopping the generator.

parameters.name: Transfer Time
parameters.comment: The time between the opening of one load switch and the closing of the other. Used during load transfer to and from the genset.

parameters.name: Horn Time
parameters.comment: When an alarm occurs this parameter determines how long the horn output will be active.

parameters.name: ATS Don’t Stop Delay
parameters.comment: When a stop request is generated by the device in any case if the genset has not stopped during this time a failure to stop error will occur.

parameters.name: ATS Don’t Start Delay
parameters.comment: When a start request is generated by the device in any case if the genset has not started during this time a non-start error will occur.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Source
parameters.comment: Output-1 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-1 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Source
parameters.comment: Output-2 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-2 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Source
parameters.comment: Output-3 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-3 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-3 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Source
parameters.comment: Output-4 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-4 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-4 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-5 Source
parameters.comment: Output-5 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-5 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-5 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Output-6 Source
parameters.comment: Output-6 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Output-6 Polarity
parameters.comment: Output-6 is the parameter for polarity selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Source
parameters.comment: Input-1 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-1 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Action
parameters.comment: Input-1 if the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-1 Arming
parameters.comment: Input-1 if the input source is set as user configured the fault function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Source
parameters.comment: Input-2 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-2 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Action
parameters.comment: Input-2 if the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-2 Arming
parameters.comment: Input-2 if the input source is set as user configured the fault function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Source
parameters.comment: Input-3 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-3 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Action
parameters.comment: Input-3 if the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-3 Arming
parameters.comment: Input-3 if the input source is set as user configured the fault function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Source
parameters.comment: Input-4 function selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Polarity
parameters.comment: Input-4 polarity selection parameter.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Action
parameters.comment: Input-4 if the input source is set as user configured the alarm action function will be activated according to the selection.

parameters.name: Digital Input-4 Arming
parameters.comment: Input-4 if the input source is set as user configured the fault function of the input will be active according to the timing selection.

parameters.name: Off Mode Selection with Stop Button
parameters.comment: If 0 is selected the device will also switch to off mode when the stop button is pressed. If 1 is selected the device will not switch to off mode when the stop button is pressed and will only stop in manual mode.

parameters.name: GCB Timing Output1 Delay
parameters.comment: GCB Timing Output1 function will be active at the end of this period when the last generator runs after the mains is cut off.

parameters.name: GCB Timing Output2 Delay
parameters.comment: GCB Timing Output2 function will be active at the end of this period when the last generator runs after the mains is cut off.

parameters.name: GCB Timing Output3 Delay
parameters.comment: GCB Timing Output2 function will be active at the end of this period when the last generator runs after the mains is cut off.
